record.field: Look up CRM lead/prospect information by name, email, or phone
Look up lead John Smith Find prospect Sarah Who is the lead with email john@example.com? Show me the lead named Mike Search leads for 555-1234
Get a summary of the CRM pipeline — counts by stage
How many leads are in the pipeline? Show me the pipeline summary What's the CRM status? How many trials are booked? Pipeline overview
List upcoming trial sessions that leads are booked into
What trials are coming up? Who has trials today? Show upcoming trial bookings Any trials booked this week? List today's trial sessions
Move a lead to the Qualified stage and generate a booking link
Qualify lead John Smith Move Sarah to qualified Send booking link to Mike Qualify the new lead
Mark a lead's trial as attended and move to Trial Attended stage
Mark John's trial as attended John Smith attended his trial Trial attended for Sarah Mark trial complete for Mike
Convert a CRM lead into a dojo member
Convert John Smith to a member Make Sarah a member Convert lead to member Sign up Mike as a member
